name: s3_document_reader
description: Read and parse a document from S3 using Bedrock Data Automation. Extracts text content from various document formats including PDF, DOCX, images, and more. Returns the extracted text content.

s3_uri.description: S3 URI of the document to read (e.g., 's3://bucket-name/path/to/document.pdf')

extract_tables.description: Whether to extract tables as structured data (default true)
